title: argentina glabriuscula var. oligandra
intro: Argentina glabriuscula var. oligandra, also known as Argentine chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Argentine chamomile include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and calming skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Argentine chamomile include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate various health concerns.
